raw_consumer_statement: I opened an XXXX XXXX XXXX card with Citi Bank and was ussued a credit limit of {$15000.00}. Card number ends in XXXX. In XX/XX/XXXX I attempted to make a purchase with XXXX XXXX for a train ticket for {$320.00} and another purchase for a bus. The card was declined repeatedly and I had to respond to several texts, calls, and email from Citi. They then required me to use verify by visa. Citi stated the card was good to use. During the pruchase process and declines, I just used another card from another bank and those purches when through without an issues. The next day I see where a purchase of {$320.00} from XXXX XXXX was allowed to post. I called Citi and told them about the decline issues, and they said they would allow the funds to go through. The next day XXXX XXXX sent an email from XXXX XXXX stating Citi notified them the charge was declined and would not be honored. This is where the nightmare continued. I attempted to contact XXXX XXXX numerous times via phone and email. I got no respone and the dates I tried to resove this were XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX, XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, and XXXX. I contacted Citi again and they provided me an XXXX # XXXX and stated the funds were released on XX/XX/XXXX. I provided XXXX XXXX with this informaion and they requested 10 days to investigate. XXXX XXXX XXXX replied after weeks of attempts from me and basically said too bad, get a refund from Citi! I provided Citi with all the emails on XXXX and sent them the email responses from XXXX XXXX  to the Citi address they provided which was XXXX with the reference # XXXX ATTENTION : XXXX  XXXX and Citi resoponed with an email stating they received the info and have reopened the investigation. I have heard nothing from Citi since after numerous calls. In fact, the only reposonce from Citi was a letter I got in the mail with the iniital dispute date in early XXXX acknowleding an issue with this merchant was filed. Everytime I call Citi, its a different answer and a dead end. Today, the Citi rep initially stated my account didnt even exist, and the card ending in XXXX incorrect. Total incometence, indiffence, and ineptness from Citi Bank. Citi claims to have a customers back " before and after every purchase '' but thats nothing more than a lie and a scam. Citi has not only allowed XXXX XXXX to steal my money, they assited and help facilitate it.
